# ImagePlaygroundOptions.Personalization.automatic

**Case**

An option to choose the most appropriate personalization behavior.

## Declaration

```swift
case automatic
```

## Discussion

This value equals [doc://com.apple.ImagePlayground/documentation/ImagePlayground/ImagePlaygroundOptions/Personalization-swift.enum/enabled] by default.
title: ImagePlaygroundOptions.Personalization.automatic
